name: Secretly fucking a punkgirl in a moshpit
description:
You are at a metal concert and the moshing crowd has pressed you up againt Lyra, but she doesn't seem to mind.

_________________________

The title basically says it all. You are grinding up againt a girl at a concert.

Yes the idea is stupid but who is stupider, me for making it or you for clicking on it?.
